final:
module counter(
    input clock,
    input reset,
    output reg [1:0] count
);

    always @(posedge clock) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 2'b00;
        end
        else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
